metadata.description: Standards bypass configuration for this branch

bypass.reason: compass/ is the devpulse-owned Compass decision store (SQLite/FTS5 — db + wal + shm) which needs its own directory. Legitimate data subdir, not operator-config (custom_config/) nor auto-gen root data. Sanctioned exception per #643.
No 'manager' citizen_class template in spawn. Devpulse is the only manager branch.
Feedback handler — console.print() IS the output. Display functions are the handler's purpose.
Feedback handler — console.print() IS the output. Display functions are the handler's purpose.
_FileLock uses Python _PrivateClass convention (underscore prefix + PascalCase).
_AIPASS_ROOT fallback for ai_mail inbox resolution. Known gap — needs registry-based path resolution.
format_wait() has 5 passing tests. Public utility for schedule display, not called in production yet.
fcntl imports guarded by early return (sys.platform == win32) at L137. Windows never reaches these lines.
Test imports git_gate.py from ~/.claude/hooks/ via importlib — external hook, not a branch module.
Standalone diagnostic tool script, not a handler.
Standalone CLI tool — print() is the intended output method.
POC hook engine — stdlib only, no prax logger. Uses sys.stderr for error reporting.
POC hook engine — exception handlers write to stderr, not prax logger.
POC test harness — catches test exceptions to report pass/fail, writes to stderr.
POC test harness — sys.path needed to import engine.py from same directory.
POC test harness — .unlink() clears ephemeral JSONL log between tests, not a tracked file.
POC test harness — usage example in docstring.
Standalone red-team diagnostic runner (FPLAN-0250 Phase 6) — print() IS the report output, same as broker_acceptance_test.py.
Red-team tool imports the real broker daemon/client + sandbox module directly to exercise them under live conditions — that is the point of an integration probe, not a handler.
Standalone script run via 'python tools/...' — sys.path insert lets it import the production modules it red-teams without being pip-installed.
Diagnostic script — docstring shows the 'python tools/...' invocation; it is not a drone-routed module.
Result.ok/bad are 2-line internal report helpers in a diagnostic script — self-evident, docstrings redundant.

Storage-layer unit test imports the compass handler's store submodule directly to exercise the _verify_fts5 FTS5 probe — there is no apps/modules/ command entry point for compass until P2 (DPLAN-0212). Same pattern as test_feedback_storage.py.

notes.usage: Add entries to bypass specific seedgo standard violations

fields.standard: Which standard to bypass (imports, cli, naming, etc.)
